vllm.title: fix: CUDA error when inferencing with Falcon-40B base model
vllm.author: kyujin-cho
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR resolves #767. As described on #767 (comment), referencing model_type instance variable results in wrongly determining model variant. Until there's some movement to fix this behavior on huggingface side, this patch will be a simple workaround to get rid of the CUDA error.

vllm.title: [Docs] Update installation page
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR updates the installation page in the doc, stating that vLLM is now shipped with pre-compiled CUDA code. Thanks to the pre-compiled binaries, vLLM now doesn't need to be aligned with the CUDA sdk installed in user machine.

vllm.title: Update setup.py
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR includes miscellaneous updates on setup.py.
